{{- $target := slice "chrome115" "edge115" "firefox116" "ios16.4" "opera101" "safari16.4" }} {{- $opts := dict "target" $target }} {{- with resources.Get "css/huggingface.css" | css.Build $opts }} {{- end }} {{- /* {{- with resources.Get "css/huggingface.css" | css.Build }} {{- if hugo.IsDevelopment }} {{- else }} {{- with . | fingerprint }} {{- end }} {{- end }} */ -}}
